contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Fix QR Code Generation GAS web-app deployment (missing webapp manifest block)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/370
  
  Details:
  Root-caused why the QR Code Generation Apps Script (1N6o00N9VtRK…) could not be deployed as a working web app: appsscript.json had no webapp block, so every clasp deployment (@HEAD + versioned @7) returned Page Not Found on /exec despite the script having a doGet (processQRCodeGenerationTelegramLogs + registerSingleQRCode). Added webapp {executeAs: USER_DEPLOYING, access: ANYONE_ANONYMOUS}, pushed via clasp, created versioned web-app deployment @8 (AKfycby8m5XEuFLyw4plNnN-_lciS8aRRP1C3VrvuqN3V3dy0hYsn92T01Icer7Qwi2NTMMN), verified live anonymously. Persisted the manifest fix + deployment metadata in the repo and logged the general lesson to agentic_ai_context/CONTEXT_UPDATES.md so GAS web-app deploys don't regress.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
